---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected (Commander, executive audience, RevOps)?

## Proposed solution

Describe the capability you'd like. If it maps to an existing spec, link it
(e.g. a PRD section or a doc under `docs/product/`).

## Phase alignment

Per the Phase Boundary & Non-Overlap Charter, is this:

- [ ] Phase 1 (deterministic, single-deal / current cross-section, ephemeral)
- [ ] Phase 2 (predictive, cohort-benchmarked, persisted, automated, multi-actor)
- [ ] Unsure

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why this one.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples, or references.
